variants: Jiaqi Shao currently resides in Celestia Trace, where he has established himself as a writer at Yieldtide Ventures. Originally from Maplewood Run, he developed an interest in literature that propelled him to attend the Dragonfly School of Letters for his education. His talents in writing have not gone unrecognized; he has been awarded the esteemed Empress Quill Medallion for his contributions to the literary world. Throughout his career, Jiaqi has remained committed to exploring innovative approaches to storytelling.
